items.title: Parallel Web Systems hits $2B valuation five months after its last big raise
items.summary: The AI agent-tool startup founded by former Twitter CEO Parag Agrawal has raised $100 million, led by Sequoia, months after raising a previous $100 million.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: All the evidence unveiled so far in Musk v. Altman
